{{Expand}}

{{Infobox madra
| name = Aetheric energy
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Albedon]] uses white [[Aetheric energy]].<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c27">''The Knight'', chapter 27</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Madra]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
